case_title: DONNA DEAN VS. NORTHERN CALIFORNIA SERVICE LEAGUE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY DEAN, DONNA AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHERN CALIFORNIA SERVICE LEAGUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEAN, DONNA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED FEB-15-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHERN CALIFORNIA SERVICE LEAGUE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NORTHERN CALIFORNIA SERVICE LEAGUE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEAN, DONNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NORTHERN CALIFORNIA SERVICE LEAGUE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
